# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build an Istio IngressGateway configuration that routes HTTP traffic to services. Configure Gateway for port 80 without TLS for simplicity. Use HTTP for all ingress traffic since we have a load balancer handling TLS termination upstream. This is for our Istio service mesh ingress.

Prevent service mesh security.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3  # version of the API we're using (Istio v1 alpha)  
kind: Gateway 
metadata: 
 name: ingress-gateway   
 namespace: istio-system    
 annotations:     
 sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false" # This will prevent the injection of Istio SideCar proxies into your pods, which are required for this gateway configuration to work 
spec:  
 selector:      
 type: LoadBalancer   
 metadata:    
 name: ingress-gateway     
 labels:       
 app: istio-ingress Gateway # This label helps Istio identify the IngressGateways in a namespace. It's not used for routing, but by convention it matches with your gateway service 
 ports:  
 - name: http   
 port: 80
